title: First-time onboarding
goal: Create a workspace, project, and teammate invitation.

tooltip.title: Create your workspace
tooltip.body: Workspaces keep projects, teammates, and settings in one shared home.

tooltip.title: Name the workspace
tooltip.body: Choose a clear name so teammates know where shared work belongs.

tooltip.title: Start a project
tooltip.body: Projects organize the work your team will plan and deliver together.

tooltip.title: Invite your teammate
tooltip.body: Bring collaborators into the workspace so they can contribute right away.
